title: waltheria maritima
intro: Waltheria maritima, also known as sea walnut or beach walnut, is a perennial plant species in the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Waltheria maritima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, and it can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
